title: Robin’s Lonely Childhood
description: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Nico Robin, Spandam, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul. Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: It's Vice Admiral Jaguar D. Saul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: Why the hell is he here!!?

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: This island isn't gonna make it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: We must pass on the history!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: Jaguar D. Saul!! Please, stop, or you'll die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: As many books as we can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Protect as many sentences as we can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: If ya stay on dis island!!!

summary: Robin escapes Ohara with the burden of its history and the fear that anyone close to her will be destroyed.
